Class ExWrap

java.lang.Object
net.dapete.exceptional.ExWrap
public final class ExWrap extends Object
Wrapping utility class for Exceptional!

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <E extends Exception>
    void
    unwrap(Class<E> exceptionClass, Runnable runnable)
    Unwraps any ExException thrown when executing runnable.run() and throws its cause instead, if it is an instance of exceptionClass.
    static <T, E extends Exception>
    T
    unwrap(Class<E> exceptionClass, Supplier<T> supplier)
    Unwraps any ExException thrown when executing supplier.get() and throws its cause instead, if it is an instance of exceptionClass.
    static <E1 extends Exception, E2 extends Exception, E3 extends Exception>
    void
    unwrap(Class<E1> exceptionClass1, Class<E2> exceptionClass2, Class<E3> exceptionClass3, Runnable runnable)
    Unwraps any ExException thrown when executing runnable.run() and throws its cause instead, if it is an instance of exceptionClass1, exceptionClass2 or exceptionClass3.
    static <T, E1 extends Exception, E2 extends Exception, E3 extends Exception>
    T
    unwrap(Class<E1> exceptionClass1, Class<E2> exceptionClass2, Class<E3> exceptionClass3, Supplier<T> supplier)
    Unwraps any ExException thrown when executing supplier.get() and throws its cause instead, if it is an instance of exceptionClass1, exceptionClass2 or exceptionClass3.
    static <E1 extends Exception, E2 extends Exception>
    void
    unwrap(Class<E1> exceptionClass1, Class<E2> exceptionClass2, Runnable runnable)
    Unwraps any ExException thrown when executing runnable.run() and throws its cause instead, if it is an instance of exceptionClass1 or exceptionClass2.
    static <T, E1 extends Exception, E2 extends Exception>
    T
    unwrap(Class<E1> exceptionClass1, Class<E2> exceptionClass2, Supplier<T> supplier)
    Unwraps any ExException thrown when executing supplier.get() and throws its cause instead, if it is an instance of exceptionClass1 or exceptionClass2.
    static void
    unwrap(Runnable runnable)
    Unwraps any ExException thrown when executing runnable.run() and throws its cause instead.
    static <T> T
    unwrap(Supplier<T> supplier)
    Unwraps any ExException thrown when executing supplier.get() and throws its cause instead.
    static <E extends Exception>
    boolean
    wrap(ExBooleanSupplier<E> supplier)
    Executes an ExBooleanSupplier, calling its getAsBoolean() method and returning the result.
    static <E extends Exception>
    double
    wrap(ExDoubleSupplier<E> supplier)
    Executes an ExDoubleSupplier, calling its getAsDouble() method and returning the result.
    static <E extends Exception>
    int
    wrap(ExIntSupplier<E> supplier)
    Executes an ExIntSupplier, calling its getAsInt() method and returning the result.
    static <E extends Exception>
    long
    wrap(ExLongSupplier<E> supplier)
    Executes an ExLongSupplier, calling its getAsLong() method and returning the result.
    static <E extends Exception>
    void
    wrap(ExRunnable<E> runnable)
    Executes an ExRunnable, calling its run() method.
    static <T, E extends Exception>
    T
    wrap(ExSupplier<T,E> supplier)
    Executes an ExSupplier, calling its get() method and returning the result.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • wrap

      public static <T, E extends Exception> T wrap(ExSupplier<T,E> supplier)
      Executes an ExSupplier, calling its get() method and returning the result.

      If a checked exception is thrown, an ExException, which is a runtime exception, will be thrown instead. This will have the original exception as its ExException.getCause() cause}.

      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of results supplied by supplier.
      E - the type of exception thrown by the ExSupplier.
      Parameters:
      supplier - an ExSupplier to execute.
      Returns:
      the result of supplier.get().
      Throws:
      ExException - if runnable.run() threw a checked exception.

    • wrap

      public static <E extends Exception> boolean wrap(ExBooleanSupplier<E> supplier)
      Executes an ExBooleanSupplier, calling its getAsBoolean() method and returning the result.

      If a checked exception is thrown, an ExException, which is a runtime exception, will be thrown instead. This will have the original exception as its ExException.getCause() cause}.

      Type Parameters:
      E - the type of exception thrown by the ExBooleanSupplier.
      Parameters:
      supplier - an ExBooleanSupplier to execute.
      Returns:
      the result of supplier.get().
      Throws:
      ExException - if runnable.run() threw a checked exception.

    • wrap

      public static <E extends Exception> double wrap(ExDoubleSupplier<E> supplier)
      Executes an ExDoubleSupplier, calling its getAsDouble() method and returning the result.

      If a checked exception is thrown, an ExException, which is a runtime exception, will be thrown instead. This will have the original exception as its ExException.getCause() cause}.

      Type Parameters:
      E - the type of exception thrown by the ExDoubleSupplier.
      Parameters:
      supplier - an ExDoubleSupplier to execute.
      Returns:
      the result of supplier.get().
      Throws:
      ExException - if runnable.run() threw a checked exception.

    • wrap

      public static <E extends Exception> int wrap(ExIntSupplier<E> supplier)
      Executes an ExIntSupplier, calling its getAsInt() method and returning the result.

      If a checked exception is thrown, an ExException, which is a runtime exception, will be thrown instead. This will have the original exception as its ExException.getCause() cause}.

      Type Parameters:
      E - the type of exception thrown by the ExIntSupplier.
      Parameters:
      supplier - an ExIntSupplier to execute.
      Returns:
      the result of supplier.get().
      Throws:
      ExException - if runnable.run() threw a checked exception.

    • wrap

      public static <E extends Exception> long wrap(ExLongSupplier<E> supplier)
      Executes an ExLongSupplier, calling its getAsLong() method and returning the result.

      If a checked exception is thrown, an ExException, which is a runtime exception, will be thrown instead. This will have the original exception as its ExException.getCause() cause}.

      Type Parameters:
      E - the type of exception thrown by the ExLongSupplier.
      Parameters:
      supplier - an ExLongSupplier to execute.
      Returns:
      the result of supplier.get().
      Throws:
      ExException - if runnable.run() threw a checked exception.

    • wrap

      public static <E extends Exception> void wrap(ExRunnable<E> runnable)
      Executes an ExRunnable, calling its run() method.

      If a checked exception is thrown, an ExException, which is a runtime exception, will be thrown instead. This will have the original exception as its cause.

      Type Parameters:
      E - the type of exception thrown by the ExRunnable.
      Parameters:
      runnable - an ExRunnable to execute.
      Throws:
      ExException - if runnable.run() threw a checked exception.

    • unwrap

      public static void unwrap(Runnable runnable) throws Exception
      Unwraps any ExException thrown when executing runnable.run() and throws its cause instead.
      Parameters:
      runnable - a runnable that may throw an ExException.
      Throws:
      Exception - the cause of the ExException, if runnable throws one.

    • unwrap

      public static <E extends Exception> void unwrap(Class<E> exceptionClass, Runnable runnable) throws E
      Unwraps any ExException thrown when executing runnable.run() and throws its cause instead, if it is an instance of exceptionClass.
      Type Parameters:
      E - the type of the cause of the ExException.
      Parameters:
      exceptionClass - the class of the cause possible of the ExException.
      runnable - a runnable that may throw an ExException.
      Throws:
      E - the cause of the ExException, if runnable throws one and its cause is an instance of exceptionClass.
      ExException - the ExException, if one was thrown and its cause is not an instance of exceptionClass.

    • unwrap

      public static <E1 extends Exception, E2 extends Exception> void unwrap(Class<E1> exceptionClass1, Class<E2> exceptionClass2, Runnable runnable) throws E1, E2
      Unwraps any ExException thrown when executing runnable.run() and throws its cause instead, if it is an instance of exceptionClass1 or exceptionClass2.
      Type Parameters:
      E1 - the type of the first possible cause of the ExException.
      E2 - the type of the second possible cause of the ExException.
      Parameters:
      exceptionClass1 - the class of the first possible cause of the ExException.
      exceptionClass2 - the class of the second possible cause of the ExException.
      runnable - a runnable that may throw an ExException.
      Throws:
      E1 - the cause of the ExException, if runnable throws one and its cause is an instance of exceptionClass1.
      E2 - the cause of the ExException, if runnable throws one and its cause is an instance of exceptionClass2.
      ExException - the ExException, if one was thrown and its cause is not an instance of exceptionClass1 or exceptionClass2.

    • unwrap

      public static <E1 extends Exception, E2 extends Exception, E3 extends Exception> void unwrap(Class<E1> exceptionClass1, Class<E2> exceptionClass2, Class<E3> exceptionClass3, Runnable runnable) throws E1, E2, E3
      Unwraps any ExException thrown when executing runnable.run() and throws its cause instead, if it is an instance of exceptionClass1, exceptionClass2 or exceptionClass3.
      Type Parameters:
      E1 - the type of the first possible cause of the ExException.
      E2 - the type of the second possible cause of the ExException.
      E3 - the type of the third possible cause of the ExException.
      Parameters:
      exceptionClass1 - the class of the first possible cause of the ExException.
      exceptionClass2 - the class of the second possible cause of the ExException.
      exceptionClass3 - the class of the third possible cause of the ExException.
      runnable - a runnable that may throw an ExException.
      Throws:
      E1 - the cause of the ExException, if runnable throws one and its cause is an instance of exceptionClass1.
      E2 - the cause of the ExException, if runnable throws one and its cause is an instance of exceptionClass2.
      E3 - the cause of the ExException, if runnable throws one and its cause is an instance of exceptionClass3.
      ExException - the ExException, if one was thrown and its cause is not an instance of exceptionClass1, exceptionClass2 or exceptionClass3.

    • unwrap

      public static <T> T unwrap(Supplier<T> supplier) throws Exception
      Unwraps any ExException thrown when executing supplier.get() and throws its cause instead.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the return type of supplier.get().
      Parameters:
      supplier - a supplier that may throw an ExException.
      Returns:
      the result of supplier.get().
      Throws:
      Exception - the cause of the ExceptionalExceptionExceptionalException, if runnable throws one.

    • unwrap

      public static <T, E extends Exception> T unwrap(Class<E> exceptionClass, Supplier<T> supplier) throws E
      Unwraps any ExException thrown when executing supplier.get() and throws its cause instead, if it is an instance of exceptionClass.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the return type of supplier.get().
      E - the type of the cause of the ExException.
      Parameters:
      exceptionClass - the class of the cause of the ExException.
      supplier - a supplier that may throw an ExException.
      Returns:
      the result of supplier.get().
      Throws:
      E - the cause of the ExException, if supplier throws one and its cause is an instance of exceptionClass.
      ExException - the ExException, if one was thrown and its cause is not an instance of exceptionClass.

    • unwrap

      public static <T, E1 extends Exception, E2 extends Exception> T unwrap(Class<E1> exceptionClass1, Class<E2> exceptionClass2, Supplier<T> supplier) throws E1, E2
      Unwraps any ExException thrown when executing supplier.get() and throws its cause instead, if it is an instance of exceptionClass1 or exceptionClass2.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the return type of supplier.get().
      E1 - the type of the first possible cause of the ExException.
      E2 - the type of the second possible cause of the ExException.
      Parameters:
      exceptionClass1 - the class of the first possible cause of the ExException.
      exceptionClass2 - the class of the second possible cause of the ExException.
      supplier - a supplier that may throw an ExException.
      Returns:
      the result of supplier.get().
      Throws:
      E1 - the cause of the ExException, if supplier throws one and its cause is an instance of exceptionClass1.
      E2 - the cause of the ExException, if supplier throws one and its cause is an instance of exceptionClass2.
      ExException - the ExException, if one was thrown and its cause is not an instance of exceptionClass1 or exceptionClass2.

    • unwrap

      public static <T, E1 extends Exception, E2 extends Exception, E3 extends Exception> T unwrap(Class<E1> exceptionClass1, Class<E2> exceptionClass2, Class<E3> exceptionClass3, Supplier<T> supplier) throws E1, E2, E3
      Unwraps any ExException thrown when executing supplier.get() and throws its cause instead, if it is an instance of exceptionClass1, exceptionClass2 or exceptionClass3.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the return type of supplier.get().
      E1 - the type of the first possible cause of the ExException.
      E2 - the type of the second possible cause of the ExException.
      E3 - the type of the third possible cause of the ExException.
      Parameters:
      exceptionClass1 - the class of the first possible cause of the ExException.
      exceptionClass2 - the class of the second possible cause of the ExException.
      exceptionClass3 - the class of the third possible cause of the ExException.
      supplier - a supplier that may throw an ExException.
      Returns:
      the result of supplier.get().
      Throws:
      E1 - the cause of the ExException, if supplier throws one and its cause is an instance of exceptionClass1.
      E2 - the cause of the ExException, if supplier throws one and its cause is an instance of exceptionClass2.
      E3 - the cause of the ExException, if supplier throws one and its cause is an instance of exceptionClass3.
      ExException - the ExException, if one was thrown and its cause is not an instance of exceptionClass1, exceptionClass2 or exceptionClass3.
